title: Accept Invite into Shared Account
story: As a DataTools Pro user who has been invited to a shared team, I want to be logged directly into the shared team account when I accept the invite and authenticate, so that I can start working in the shared workspace immediately.
description: When an invited user accepts an invitation and authenticates via Salesforce, redirect them directly to the shared team account instead of their personal instance. Previously, users landed on their personal account and had to manually switch.
acceptance_criteria: Accepting an invite link redirects the user to the shared team account after authentication
User does not land on their personal instance first
ux_changes: Users accepting an invite are now redirected to the shared team account instead of their personal instance.
middleware_changes: Authentication flow updated to detect invite acceptance and redirect to the appropriate shared team context.
implementation_notes: Changes merged directly to production and tested.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the redirect and deployed to production. Ready for review.
